name: buzzsprout
description: Reads Buzzsprout podcasts and episodes (titles, publish dates, durations, play counts) and creates/updates episodes through the Buzzsprout REST API.

risk.read: external Buzzsprout API read of podcast and episode data
risk.write: external mutation of episode metadata/audio (create_episode, update_episode) on the configured podcast; can trigger audio processing and publish/unpublish an episode
